title: Department Of Engineering To Host Public Meeting For South Ave Bridge
summary: The City of Syracuse Department of Engineering will host a public meeting on March 24, 2026, to solicit community feedback on planned rehabilitation of the South Avenue Bridge over Onondaga Creek. Proposed work includes replacing bearings and pedestals, rebuilding sidewalks and curbs, repairing masonry and concrete, and sealing/painting structural elements. Online comments will be accepted through April 10.

political_signal.description: Mayor emphasizes infrastructure investment as critical to public safety and connectivity; frames bridge rehabilitation as essential civic infrastructure maintenance with mayoral backing.

processing_notes: No dollar amounts or specific project timeline (completion date) provided
